Hi, I'm Piyusha 👋
  
Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and cloud-based solutions using React, Node.js, GenAI, and modern cloud technologies.
  
I enjoy designing end-to-end systems — from intuitive frontend experiences to performant backend architectures and AI-powered workflows.
  
Tech I work with:  
⚡ React & TypeScript  
⚡ Node.js & APIs  
⚡ Generative AI & AI Integrations  
⚡ Cloud & Distributed Systems  
⚡ Microservices & Event-Driven Architecture  
  
Passionate about solving real-world problems through clean architecture, continuous learning, and impactful technology.
  
Currently exploring scalable AI systems, cloud-native development, and high-performance engineering 🚀
